ActionCardPresets.Title: Create Action Card from Preset
ActionCardPresets.BlankCardDescription: Create a blank action card with default settings
ActionCardPresets.PreserveEmbeddedInfo: This will reconfigure the card's behavior. Embedded items and effects will be preserved.

BasicAttack.Label: Basic Attack
BasicAttack.Description: A simple attack roll with damage on success. No status effects.

DamageAndStatus.Label: Damage + Status
DamageAndStatus.Description: A physical attack that deals damage and applies a status effect on success.

SpellWithStatus.Label: Spell with Status
SpellWithStatus.Description: A magical attack with spellcasting stats that deals damage and applies a status effect.

HealingSpell.Label: Healing Spell
HealingSpell.Description: A self-targeting heal that restores health without an attack roll.

MultiHitAttack.Label: Multi-Hit Attack
MultiHitAttack.Description: An attack that rolls multiple times, potentially hitting several targets.

MultiHitStatus.Label: Multi-Hit + Status
MultiHitStatus.Description: A multi-hit attack that applies damage and status effects with each successful hit.

DefensiveBuff.Label: Defensive Buff
DefensiveBuff.Description: Self-targeting buff with no damage. Applies effects to the user on a successful roll.

TransformationTrigger.Label: Transformation Trigger
TransformationTrigger.Description: Triggers a transformation on a successful roll. No damage or status effects.

CritFishing.Label: Crit Fishing
CritFishing.Description: An attack that only deals damage on a critical hit, but with increased damage.

DirectDamage.Label: Direct Damage
DirectDamage.Description: Flat damage or healing with no attack roll. Useful for effects like magic missile or environmental damage.

Presets.Label: Preset
Presets.Description: Choose a starting template for your action card

Fields.Name: Name
Fields.AdvanceInitiativeHint: Automatically advance initiative after executing this card
Fields.SelfTargetHint: Automatically target your own actor instead of requiring target selection
Fields.RepetitionsHint: Number of times to repeat this action (can be a formula like 1d4)
Fields.StatusApplicationLimitHint: Maximum times status effects can apply per execution (0 = unlimited)
